prompt: Tap hj as the position anchor before acting.
why_v1: Position anchors keep order and pressure reads stable.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. The hijack is the right seat anchor, so the read stays tied to the earlier late-position seat that starts the pressure line.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. Anchor the hijack first so the mixed read stays tied to the right position before you choose an action.
